name: Pre-existing public content - does that weaken my Perplexity case?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing public content - does that weaken my Perplexity case?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, copyright protects expression even if facts public; substantial similarity key.[1] NYT articles copyrighted despite news nature.[1] Key factors: original expression copied, not just facts.[1] Transformative use rare for AI answers. Strength unchanged.
